title.en: As a result, no one has occupied this ancient t...

content.en:
The Void Emperor Pavilion is located in the Void Emperor Mountain, which also belongs to the Ancient Treasure Land, but was arranged by the Lord of the Void Emperor.

If you don't hold the Void Emperor Order, you won't be able to enter the Void Emperor Mountain.

As a result, no one has occupied this ancient treasure so far.

At this time, there was not a single Heavenly Ancestor near Xuhuang Mountain, and the surrounding area was extremely silent, not even a single creature existed.

Ye Tian came here and urged the Void Emperor Order.

Airplanes!

The light of the Void Emperor Order hooked up this magic circle, allowing Ye Tian to enter the Void Emperor Mountain without hindrance and come to the front of the Void Emperor Pavilion.

The door of the Void Emperor Pavilion was open and unimpeded.

However, Ye Tian could still sense the terrifying power contained inside the Void Emperor Pavilion, if there was no Void Emperor Order, he would not be able to break into the Void Emperor Pavilion at all.

Ye Tian stepped into the interior of the Void Emperor Pavilion.

At this time, a phanthropic shadow appeared, this is the phantom of the image of a big man, full of traces of time and coercion.

This kind of aura is not like a machine spirit, but even more like a wisp of immeasurable will.

"Lord of the Void Emperor?"

Ye Tian shouted.

"Yes, I am the Lord of the Void Emperor!"

Dahan said lightly.

"But hasn't the Lord of the Void Emperor fallen?" Ye Tian wondered.

The Lord of the Void Emperor smiled and said: "It seems that you just got the Void Emperor Decree by accident, you don't know my situation, I have indeed fallen, but I used a special method to preserve my immeasurable will in the Void Emperor Pavilion, but I can't leave here, once I leave, the immeasurable will will immediately shatter." "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood in an instant.

It is easy to preserve the immeasurable will, but it is extremely difficult to save a wisp of immeasurable will illusory from the injuries that can cause the bone transformation realm to fall.

"Little guy, every Heavenly Ancestor who has obtained the Void Emperor's Order can get a reward through my mission, what reward do you want?" asked the Lord of the Void Emperor.

"Lord of the Void Emperor, I want the top-grade primeval root marrow to use to impact the Nine Blood Transformation Realm. Ye Tian said.

"I do have some of the best primordial roots. The Lord of the Void Emperor said, "Most of the Eight Blood Transformation Realm primordial-level geniuses like you want this kind of resource to break through the realm, but unfortunately, very few primordial-level geniuses can complete my task. "

"Please also ask the Lord of the Void Emperor to tell me about the mission requirements. "

Ye Tiandao.

"Okay, I'll give you a task!" The Lord of the Void Emperor waved his hand, and a task appeared.

"Collect the Ancient Void Stone, and a piece of the Ancient Void Stone can be exchanged for a hundred drops of the Superior Ancient Root Essence from me. The Lord of the Void Emperor said.

"Ancient Void Stone, what is this?"

Ye Tian was a little puzzled.

The Lord of the Void Emperor smiled and said, "The Ancient Void Stone is useless to ordinary Heavenly Ancestors, but it is useful to me. If I want to keep this immeasurable will immortal, I need the power of the Ancient Void Stone to maintain it. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

Subsequently, the Lord of the Void Emperor revealed the Ancient Void Stone and informed him of the information of the Ancient Void Stone, so that he would not miss it.

"The Ancient Void Stones are mainly distributed in the Ancient Bitter Sea, you don't even know the Ancient Void Stone, and you shouldn't know the Ancient Bitter Sea, the Ancient Bitter Sea is not considered an Ancient Treasure Land, because it doesn't give birth to any resources at all, only some Ancient Void Stones. In addition, the Ancient Bitter Sea suppressed the Bone Transformation Realm a lot, and had no effect on the Blood Transformation Realm. However, once you enter the Ancient Bitter Sea, you will be eroded by the seawater of the Ancient Bitter Sea. The Ancient Bitter Sea once fell an incomparably terrifying bone transformation realm creature, its blood contained terrifying corrosive power, and it had been fused with the sea for a long time, so it would not give birth to other resources, and only the indestructible Ancient Void Stone could be preserved. "

The Lord of the Void Emperor introduced.

"So, it's hard to find the Ancient Void Stone?" Ye Tian asked.

"It's not easy!" said the Lord of the Void Emperor: "It may be that the number of Ancient Void Stones is relatively small, coupled with the waste of time, and the corrosiveness of the Ancient Bitter Sea, staying there for a long time will cause irreparable damage to the body." Therefore, there are very few blood transformation realms who are willing to go to the Ancient Bitter Sea to find the Ancient Void Stone. Of course, you can also wait until the Sea of Boundless Rift is opened, but when it will be opened, I am not clear about this wisp of immeasurable will. "

The sea of no Geng!

Ye Tian also knew that this boundary crack belonged to the same boundary gap as the ruins of the Dragon Sea, but if he wanted to open it, he would have to wait for a long time.

Therefore, it is impossible for him to wait for the opening of the sea of Wugeng.

Therefore, he could only go to the Ancient Bitter Sea.

Other primeval-level geniuses were afraid of going to the primeval bitter sea, but he was not afraid.

Subsequently, he left the Void Emperor Pavilion.

......

The Ancient Sea of Bitterness.

This place is very far away from Cosmos City, and it is not the sphere of influence of cultivators, it is the territory of a group of Blood Transformation Realm races.

Of course, no matter how strong Ye Tian's strength is, he can go anywhere, and there will be no blood transformation realm race looking for death to intercept him.

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian used the Ancient Body, kept moving and shuttling, and it took a while to finally arrive at the Ancient Sea of Bitterness.

"This is it!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he directly broke into the primeval sea of suffering.

There was no suppression of strength, but the corrosiveness of the primeval bitter sea shocked him.

"Such a terrifying corrosive power, constantly pouring into my body, the Lord of the Void Emperor has said it more tactfully, even the Eight Blood Transformation Realm Ancient Geniuses can't stay here for too long, and it is unbelievable that ordinary Eight Blood Transformation Realm powerhouses can stay here for a day. Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, he didn't care about the corrosive power, and went deep into the Ancient Sea of Bitterness to find the Ancient Void Stone.

In the primeval sea of bitterness, it was as if there was nothing, not even a single living being, and everything seemed to have been eroded by corrosive forces.

As the years passed, Ye Tian was constantly looking for the primeval void stone here, and his body was constantly corroded, but he didn't care about it.

this day.

Ye Tian finally found a primeval void stone.

"Go on!"

He kept searching, and one after another primeval void stones were found by him.

Of course, his flesh was also corroded to the point that it could not be shaped, and the immeasurable bones that had become bones were exposed.

The sea water here can corrode flesh and blood, but it can't corrode the immeasurable bones after bone transformation.

It's just that his appearance looks very hideous.

Ye Tian was going to find enough Ancient Void Stones before leaving here to go to the Void Emperor Pavilion.

After all, his Void Emperor Decree could not be used permanently, so he had to cherish every opportunity to enter the Void Emperor Pavilion.

A long time passed, and Ye Tian gradually couldn't find the Ancient Void Stone in the Ancient Bitter Sea.
